params.name: 1001 Nights
params.source: Bharata Treasure Maps(0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.08%)
params.description:
On Sept 21, AD 900, the "Arabian Nights" was published and spread all over Eurasia. Legend has it that a girl told the king stories for 1001 days and finally moved him. People later collected more than a hundred stories of which and edited into an anthology.
These stories reflected the charisma of the Oriental culture and combined people's imagination of the Arabic social reality at adventure, especially the bravery of the navigators as many countries were developed by maritime trade. Althou …
